description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on a matrix of ROS 2 distributions (jazzy, kilted, rolling) on ubuntu-24.04, checks out the code to a specific path, sets up ROS, and runs ROS CI tests.
